name: John Templeton
philosophy: Search globally for underappreciated value and let patience work where consensus is too pessimistic.
risk_rules: Do not mistake cheapness caused by structural decay for true mispricing.
portfolio_habits: Comfortable leaning contrarian when dispersion is wide

commentary_snapshots.summary: Representative emphasis on global diversification and contrarian value.

blind_spots: Can wait a long time for value realization
